flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rochester University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.5k → $29.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rochester University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.5k → $29.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Rochester University fell 13% between 2006 and 2009 (16.8% → 14.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rochester University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).
